businesses.name: Kiprotich Accounting Services
businesses.description: Bookkeeping, tax returns, and business advisory for small businesses and community members across Victoria.

businesses.name: Nandi Fresh Produce
businesses.description: Fresh vegetables, grains, and specialty Kenyan ingredients supplied to families and events in greater Melbourne.

businesses.name: Rift Valley Transport
businesses.description: Reliable courier and event transport for community gatherings, airport runs, and regional deliveries.

news.title: Taunet Business Network launch
news.summary: We are launching a community business directory to connect Kalenjin-owned businesses across Victoria.
news.body: The Taunet Nelel Business Hub helps members promote services, share opportunities, and support one another. List your business or check the directory for trusted community providers.

news.title: Gala sponsorship opportunities open
news.summary: Local businesses can sponsor the 2026 Gala and gain visibility across our events and social channels.
news.body: Packages include logo placement, stage mentions, and a feature in our Business News feed. Contact info@taunetnelel.org for the sponsorship kit.

news.title: Member spotlight: catering services
news.summary: Several members now offer catering for birthdays, weddings, and community functions.
news.body: Browse the business directory for food and event suppliers. If you offer catering, ask the admin team to add or update your business card.

blog.title: Starting a side business in Australia
blog.author: Taunet Nelel Team
blog.summary: Practical first steps for registering an ABN, understanding tax obligations, and finding community mentors.
blog.body: Many members run successful side businesses while working full time. Start with an ABN, keep simple records from day one, and connect with other entrepreneurs in the Business Hub for referrals and advice.

blog.title: Why we built a community business directory
blog.author: Taunet Nelel Team
blog.summary: Supporting Kalenjin-owned businesses strengthens the whole community.
blog.body: When we buy from and refer each other, we keep skills and resources within our network. The Business Hub makes it easier to discover trusted providers and celebrate member success stories.
